rulebook_urls.label: Sea Salt & Paper: Extra Pepper — Official English Rulebook

chunks.title: Extra Pepper: Expansion Setup
chunks.content:
## Extra Pepper: Expansion Setup

Requires the Sea Salt & Paper base game.

**New Components:** 12 Event cards, 1 mini rulebook.

### Additional Setup Step
After completing base game setup, shuffle the 12 Event cards into a **separate face-down deck** and place it next to the main draw pile.

> Event cards are **never mixed** into the main Sea Salt & Paper deck.

chunks.title: Event Cards — How They Work
chunks.content:
## Event Card System

Each event card has two distinct zones:

| Zone | Description |
|---|---|
| **Round Effect** | A rule that applies to **all players** for the entire round it is revealed |
| **Trophy symbol** | Determines who *keeps* the card after scoring — **+** goes to the points leader, **−** goes to the points trailer |

The trophy rule only activates **after** the round ends. A held card's effect applies only to its holder and is discarded the moment that player is no longer in the qualifying position. A player may hold at most **one** personal event card at a time.

chunks.title: Event Cards — Full Reference
chunks.content:
## Event Cards

12 cards in a separate deck. Reveal one at the start of each round — its effect applies to all players that round. After scoring, award the card to the points leader (+) or trailer (−); its effect then applies only to that holder going forward.

| # | Name | Trophy | Round Effect (all players) |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | The Kraken | − | Each octopus card scores only **1 pt** this round |
| 2 | Dance of the Mermaids | + | Holding **3** mermaid cards (instead of 4) triggers an instant round win |
| 3 | Tornado | − | Mermaid cards score **0 pts** this round (collecting all 4 still wins instantly) |
| 4 | Treasure Chest | + | "Stop" / "Last Chance" threshold raised to **10 pts** (from 7) |
| 5 | Diodon Fish | − | "Stop" is **forbidden** this round — only "Last Chance" may be called |
| 6 | The Angelfish | + | After your turn, if both face-up discard cards share a color, you may take one into your hand |
| 7 | Dolphins | + | When you discard a collection card during Option A, draw the top card of the draw pile |
| 8 | Coral Reef | − | You may place a shell card face-down in front of you (removing it from scoring) to become immune to attack cards |
| 9 | Dance of the Shells | + | Crab + Crab duo: active player takes one card from **each** discard pile |
| 10 | Hermit Crab | − | When any player discards a collection card, the top draw pile card goes to the **discarder's** hand |
| 11 | Sunfish | + | Fish + Fish duo: active player draws the top **two** cards (instead of one) |
| 12 | Sea Turtle | − | Shell cards each score a flat **2 pts** this round (overrides the normal shell table) |

### Interaction Notes
- **Dance of the Shells (9):** upgrades Crab + Crab to match the base Crab + Lobster effect for the round.
- **Sunfish (11):** upgrades Fish + Fish from 1 draw to 2 draws.
- **The Kraken (1):** flat 1 pt per octopus, regardless of how many you hold.
- **Sea Turtle (12):** flat 2 pts per shell, overrides entire shell scoring table.
- **Tornado (3):** suppresses mermaid point bonuses but the 4-mermaid instant win still fires.

chunks.title: Expansion: Turn Structure Changes
chunks.content:
## New End-of-Turn Option (The Angelfish, card 6)

When **The Angelfish (+)** event is active, the holder gains a new optional action after Step 2:

| New Step | Condition | Action |
|----------|-----------|--------|
| 3 — End-of-Turn Grab | The two face-up discard top cards are the same color | You **may** take one of those cards into your hand |

## Modified Step 1 — Discard Triggers

| Event Card | Trigger | Effect |
|------------|---------|--------|
| **Dolphins (+)** (card 7) | You discard a collection card during Option A | Immediately draw the top card of the draw pile |
| **Hermit Crab (−)** (card 10) | Any player discards a collection card during Option A | Top card of draw pile goes to the **discarder's** hand |

## Modified Step 2 — Duo Play Effects

| Event Card | Pair Played | Modified Effect |
|------------|-------------|------------------|
| **Dance of the Shells (+)** (card 9) | Crab + Crab | Take one card from **each** discard pile |
| **Sunfish (+)** (card 11) | Fish + Fish | Draw the top **two** cards of the draw pile |

chunks.title: Event Cards: Modified Scoring Rules
chunks.content:
## Event Cards That Change Scoring

Some event cards override base game VP values for the duration of the round they are active.

| Event Card | Affected Component | Base Game Score | This Round's Score |
|---|---|---|---|
| The Kraken (−) | Each Octopus card | Set-collection table (0/3/6/9/12) | **1 pt flat per card** |
| Sea Turtle (−) | Each Shell card | Set-collection table (0/2/4/6/8/10) | **2 pts flat per card** |
| Tornado (−) | Mermaid cards | +1 pt per most plentiful color | **0 pts** |
| Dance of the Mermaids (+) | Mermaid instant-win threshold | Collect all **4** Mermaids | Collect **3** Mermaids → instant round win |
| Treasure Chest (+) | Round-end call threshold | 7 pts to call Stop/Last Chance | **10 pts** required |
